## Summary

- 

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/release
- [ ] Refactor/maintenance

## Verification

- [ ] `go test ./...`
- [ ] `go vet ./...`
- [ ] `gofmt -l` returns no changed files

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the `purelink` binary/command name unchanged unless explicitly required.
- [ ] I updated documentation for user-facing behavior changes.
- [ ] I avoided committing secrets, API keys, or private endpoint data.
